subject: [PATCH v6 08/22] zswap: prepare zswap for swap virtualization

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch prepares the zswap code for swap virtualization by removing its dependency on the range partition logic and replacing it with a simple unified zswap tree. The changes include updating the zswap.h header file to remove unused functions, modifying the swapfile.c file to remove calls to these functions, and updating the zswap.c file to use the new unified zswap tree. This patch is part of a larger series that aims to virtualize swap space in Linux.
